heading: Enforcement action plan for advertising and promotion restrictions
label: 387f–1 Enforcement action plan for advertising and promotion restrictions
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Family Smoking Prevention and Tobacco Control Act, and not as part of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act which comprises this chapter.

Modification of Deadlines for Secretarial ActionWith respect to any time periods specified in div. A of that begin on , within which the Secretary of Health and Human Services is required to carry out and complete specified activities, with certain limitations, the calculation of such time periods shall commence on the first day of the first fiscal quarter following the initial 2 consecutive fiscal quarters of fiscal year 2010 for which the Secretary has collected fees under , and the Secretary may extend or reduce the duration of one or more such time periods, except that no such period shall be extended for more than 90 days, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 111–31section 387s of this titlesection 6 of Pub. L. 111–31section 387 of this titleJune 22, 2009

children.heading: Development
children.label: 1 Development
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Secretary of Health and Human Services (in this section referred to as the “Secretary”) shall develop and publish an action plan to enforce restrictions adopted pursuant to , as added by section 101(b) of this division, or pursuant to , on promotion and advertising of menthol and other cigarettes to youth.June 22, 2009section 387f of this titlesection 387a–1(a) of this title

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 2 Consultation
children.text: The action plan required by paragraph (1) shall be developed in consultation with public health organizations and other stakeholders with demonstrated expertise and experience in serving minority communities.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: 3 Priority
children.text: The action plan required by paragraph (1) shall include provisions designed to ensure enforcement of the restrictions described in paragraph (1) in minority communities.

children.heading: Information on authority
children.label: 1 Information on authority
children.text: Not later than 3 months after , the Secretary shall inform State, local, and tribal governments of the authority provided to such entities under , as added by section 203 of this division, or preserved by such entities under , as added by section 101(b) of this division.June 22, 2009section 1334(c) of title 15section 387p of this title

children.heading: Community assistance
children.label: 2 Community assistance
children.text: At the request of communities seeking assistance to prevent underage tobacco use, the Secretary shall provide such assistance, including assistance with strategies to address the prevention of underage tobacco use in communities with a disproportionate use of menthol cigarettes by minors.
